array.string: repo="$HOME/GitHub/insurance-outcome-intelligence-capstone"; mkdir -p "$repo/logs"; cd "$repo" && exec "$repo/.venv/bin/python" -m streamlit run dashboard.py --server.port 8502 --server.address 127.0.0.1 --server.headless true --server.fileWatcherType none --browser.gatherUsageStats false >> "$repo/logs/msds498-dashboard.out.log" 2>> "$repo/logs/msds498-dashboard.err.log"
